name: Kernel.gaussian
description: 将图像与二维高斯函数离散化得到的卷积核进行卷积，实现低通滤波。
descriptionEn: Convolve the image with a convolution kernel obtained by discretizing a two-dimensional Gaussian function to achieve low-pass filtering.

args.name: radius
args.description: 要生成的内核的半径。

args.name: sigma
args.description: 高斯函数的标准差（与半径单位相同）。

args.name: normalize
args.description: 将核值归一化为总和为1。

args.name: magnitude
args.description: 按照用户自定义数值，缩放卷积核每个值。

definitionJson.name: Kernel.gaussian
definitionJson.author: OGE
definitionJson.description: 将图像与二维高斯函数离散化得到的卷积核进行卷积，实现低通滤波。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Convolve the image with a convolution kernel obtained by discretizing a two-dimensional Gaussian function to achieve low-pass filtering.

sampleCode:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

ls8 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
b3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B3"])
kernel = service.getProcess("Kernel.gaussian").execute(1,1,False,1)
a = service.getProcess("Coverage.convolve").execute(b3,kernel)

vis_params = {"min": -1, "max": 1, "palette": ["#808080", "#949494", "#a9a9a9", "#bdbebd", "#d3d3d3","#e9e9e9"]}
a.styles(vis_params).getMap("a")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.30, 30.608, 10)
author: OGE

name: Coverage.slope
description: 量化地表表面上某一点的倾斜程度。其核心是计算该点所在的地表切平面与水平面之间的最大夹角，从而反映地形的陡峭程度。
descriptionEn: Quantify the tilt of a point on the surface. The core is to calculate the maximum angle between the tangential plane of the surface where the point is located and the horizontal plane, so as to reflect the steepness of the terrain.

args.name: coverage
args.description: 用于计算坡度操作的栅格数据。

args.name: radius
args.description: 用于计算坡度的方形邻域的半径，对于3*3方形为1。

args.name: Z_factor
args.description: 当表面z单位与地面x、y单位不同时，用于正确坡度计算的z因子。z-Factor = 1.0：高程与水平单位一致（推荐） z-Factor > 1.0：增强高程起伏效果 z-Factor < 1.0：减弱高程起伏影响

definitionJson.name: Coverage.slope
definitionJson.author: OGE
definitionJson.description: 量化地表表面上某一点的倾斜程度。其核心是计算该点所在的地表切平面与水平面之间的最大夹角，从而反映地形的陡峭程度。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Quantify the tilt of a point on the surface. The core is to calculate the maximum angle between the tangential plane of the surface where the point is located and the horizontal plane, so as to reflect the steepness of the terrain.

sampleCode:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()
dem = service.getCoverage(coverageID="ASTGTM_N28E056", productID="ASTER_GDEM_DEM30")
# z-factor参数经纬度坐标系下取0.000009473，代表经纬度向米的转换，中纬度地区1米=0.000009473度
a = service.getProcess("Coverage.slope").execute(dem, 1, 0.000009473)
vis_params = {
              "palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]}

a.styles(vis_params).getMap("a")
dem.styles(vis_params).getMap("dem")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(56.25, 28.40, 11)
author: OGE

sampleCode:
import oge
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()
# 读取数据
lc08 = service.getCoverage(
    coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
b4 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08, ["B4"])
# 调用函数处理数据
res = service.getProcess("Coverage.reproject").execute(b4, 3857, 100)

# 设置渲染模式，其中"min":-1代表将-1映射到png图像的0，max": 1代表将1映射到png图像的255，"palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]设置了渲染模式

vis_params = {"palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]}

res.styles(vis_params).getMap("res")

name: Coverage.warpByGDAL
description: 将栅格重新投影到另一个坐标参考系统(CRS)。可以选择输出文件分辨率和重采样方法。
descriptionEn: Projects a raster layer into another Coordinate Reference System (CRS) The output file resolution and the sampling method can be chosen.

args.name: input
args.description: 输入用于重投影操作的栅格数据。

args.name: sourceCrs
args.description: 定义输入栅格图层的CRS。

args.name: targetCrs
args.description: 定义输出栅格图层的CRS。

args.name: resampling
args.description: 使用的像素值重采样方法。

args.name: noData
args.description: 设置输出波段的无数据值。如果未提供，则将从源数据集中复制nodata值。

args.name: targetResolution
args.description: 定义重投影结果的输出文件分辨率。

args.name: options
args.description: 用于添加一个或多个控制要创建的栅格的创建选项。

args.name: dataType
args.description: 定义输出栅格文件的格式。

args.name: targetExtent
args.description: 设置要创建的输出文件的地理参考范围。

args.name: targetExtentCrs
args.description: 设置地理参考范围的坐标系。

args.name: multiThreading
args.description: 两个线程将用于处理图像块并同时执行输入/输出操作。请注意，计算本身不是多线程的。

args.name: extra
args.description: 添加额外的GDAL命令行选项。

definitionJson.descriptionEn: Generates a boolean kernel shaped like a plus sign. It defines a rectangular (or square) neighborhood within which all pixels have equal weight.

sampleCode:

name: Coverage.resampFilterByGrass
description: 使用分析核重新采样栅格数据。
descriptionEn: Examples raster map layers using an analytical kernel.

args.name: input

args.description: 重采样后新的栅格数据的分辨率。

args.name: filter
args.description: 滤波核选项包括：方窗 (box)、巴特利特窗 (bartlett)、高斯窗 (gauss)、正态窗 (normal)、埃尔米特窗 (hermite)、辛格窗 (sinc)、兰索斯1阶窗 (lanczos1)、兰索斯2阶窗 (lanczos2)、兰索斯3阶窗 (lanczos3)、汉宁窗 (hann)、汉明窗 (hamming)、布莱克曼窗 (blackman)。

args.name: radius

definitionJson.author: GRASS
definitionJson.description: 使用分析核重新采样栅格数据。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Examples raster map layers using an analytical kernel.

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化import oge

# 初始化

service = oge.Service()
# 读取数据
lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
temp = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08, ["B3"])

# 调用函数处理数据

# 设置渲染模式，其中"min":-1代表将-1映射到png图像的0，max": 1代表将1映射到png图像的255，"palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]设置了渲染模式

idw.styles(vis_params).getMap("idw")

name: Coverage.focalMean
description: 均值滤波是一种简单且常用的线性信号处理技术，其核心思想是用一个像素（或数据点）及其邻域内所有像素值的算术平均值来替代该像素中心点的值。这种方法能有效平滑数据、抑制噪声，但会导致细节模糊。
descriptionEn: Mean filtering is a simple and commonly used linear signal processing technique. Its core idea is to replace the value of the center point of a pixel (or data point) with the arithmetic average of all pixel values in its neighborhood. This method can effectively smooth data and suppress noise, but it can lead to blurred details.

args.name: coverage
args.description: The coverage to which to apply the operations.

args.name: kernelType
args.description: The type of kernel to use.

args.name: radius
args.description: The radius of the kernel to use.

definitionJson.name: Coverage.focalMean
definitionJson.author: OGE
definitionJson.description: 均值滤波是一种简单且常用的线性信号处理技术，其核心思想是用一个像素（或数据点）及其邻域内所有像素值的算术平均值来替代该像素中心点的值。这种方法能有效平滑数据、抑制噪声，但会导致细节模糊。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Mean filtering is a simple and commonly used linear signal processing technique. Its core idea is to replace the value of the center point of a pixel (or data point) with the arithmetic average of all pixel values in its neighborhood. This method can effectively smooth data and suppress noise, but it can lead to blurred details.

definitionJson.author: OGE
definitionJson.description: 如果两个影像都只含有一个波段，则将两个波段相减；如果两个影像中存在多个波段，则对应波段相减。

sampleCode:
import oge

# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()
# 读取数据
ls8 = service.getCoverage(
    coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
# 选取波段
b3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B3"])
b2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B2"])

# 调用函数处理数据
a = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtract").execute(b3, b2)
# 设置渲染模式，其中"min":-100代表将-100映射到png图像的0，max": 100代表将100映射到png图像的255，"palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]设置了渲染模式


vis_params = {}

a.styles(vis_params).getMap("res")
# 设置可视化地图中心和显示层级
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.30, 30.608, 8)

name: Coverage.hillShadeByGDAL
description: 基于GDAL工具，根据输入的数字高程模型（通常为DEM）计算生成山体阴影栅格。
descriptionEn: Computes a hillshade raster from an input elevation dataset (typically a DEM) using the GDAL Hillshade algorithm.

args.name: input
args.description: 输入用于山体阴影计算操作的栅格数据。

args.name: combined
args.description: 控制是否在标准朗伯反射（Lambertian）光照模型的基础上，叠加“自阴影”效果。

args.name: computeEdges
args.description: 从高程栅格计算边缘。

args.name: extra
args.description: 其他GDAL命令行选项。

args.name: band
args.description: 包含海拔信息的波段。

args.name: altitude
args.description: 定义光照的高度（以度为单位）。如果光来自高程栅格上方，则为90；如果是倾斜光，则为0。

args.name: zevenbergenThorne
args.description: 激活Zevenbergen&Thorne算法，适合平滑地形。

args.name: zFactor
args.description: 将垂直单位（Z）统一转换到与水平单位（X, Y）相同的尺度。

args.name: multidirectional
args.description: 启用多方向照明。综合模拟多个光源方向，消除单向阴影，生成无方向性的、纯粹表示地表起伏的“地形晕渲”图。

args.name: scale
args.description: 垂直单位与水平单位的比率。

args.name: azimuth
args.description: 光源方向，从正北顺时针起算的角度（0-360度）。默认315度（西北方向），这是制图学中产生自然立体感的常用角度。

args.name: options
args.description: 用于添加一个或多个控制要创建的栅格的创建选项。

definitionJson.name: Coverage.hillShadeByGDAL

name: Kernel.laplacian8
description: 二阶微分拉普拉斯算子的八邻域离散化形式。与laplacian4（四邻域）相比，它不仅考虑了中心像素的上下左右四个直接相邻像素，还加入了四个对角线方向（左上、右上、左下、右下）的邻域信息。其核心功能同样是检测图像中的强度二阶变化。
descriptionEn: An eight-neighborhood discretization of the second-order differential Laplacian operator. Compared with laplacian4 (four neighborhoods), it not only considers the four directly adjacent pixels above, below, left, and right of the central pixel, but also adds neighborhood information in four diagonal directions (upper left, upper right, lower left, and lower right). Its core function is also to detect second-order changes in intensity in the image.

args.name: normalize
args.description: 将核值归一化为总和为1。

definitionJson.name: Kernel.laplacian8
definitionJson.description: 二阶微分拉普拉斯算子的八邻域离散化形式。与laplacian4（四邻域）相比，它不仅考虑了中心像素的上下左右四个直接相邻像素，还加入了四个对角线方向（左上、右上、左下、右下）的邻域信息。其核心功能同样是检测图像中的强度二阶变化。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: An eight-neighborhood discretization of the second-order differential Laplacian operator. Compared with laplacian4 (four neighborhoods), it not only considers the four directly adjacent pixels above, below, left, and right of the central pixel, but also adds neighborhood information in four diagonal directions (upper left, upper right, lower left, and lower right). Its core function is also to detect second-order changes in intensity in the image.

name: Coverage.gridInverseDistanceNNRByGDAL
alias: 网格化（最近邻反距离权重插值法）
aliasEn: Grid based (nearest neighbor search inverse distance weighting method)
description: 通过搜索每个网格节点周围最近的已知样本点，并依据反距离权重原则计算节点预测值，最终生成连续的空间分布表面。
descriptionEn: By searching for the nearest known sample points around each grid node and calculating the node prediction value based on the inverse distance weight principle, a continuous spatial distribution surface is finally generated.

args.name: input
args.description: 输入用于网格化操作的矢量数据。

args.name: extra
args.description: 添加额外的GDAL命令行选项。

args.name: power
args.description: 控制权重随距离衰减的速度。

args.name: radius
args.description: 搜索圆的半径。

args.name: smoothing
args.description: 防止在插值点无限接近采样点时权重趋于无穷大。

args.name: maxPoints
args.description: 在搜索半径内，参与每个网格节点插值计算的最大最近邻样本点数量。

args.name: minPoints
args.description: 要平均的最小数据点数量。如果发现的点数量较少，则网格节点被视为空，并将用NODATA标记填充。

args.name: nodata
args.description: 定义没有栅格像元值的背景值或无效值。

args.name: zField
args.description: 用于插值的字段。

args.name: dataType
args.description: 定义输出栅格文件的数据类型。

args.name: options
args.description: 用于添加一个或多个控制要创建的栅格的创建选项。

definitionJson.author: QGIS

feature2 = service.getProcess("Feature_deprecated.point").execute([38,10.5], "{Te:11}", "EPSG:4326")

# 最近邻插值

name: Coverage.polygonizeByGDAL
description: 将输入栅格数据转换为矢量多边形数据。该算子可自动将相同像元值的连通区域合并为多边形，并支持将栅格属性（如像元值）保留为矢量图层的属性字段。
descriptionEn: Convert input raster data to vector polygon data. This operator can automatically merge connected areas with the same cell values ​​into polygons, and supports retaining raster attributes (such as cell values) as attribute fields of vector layers.

args.name: input
args.description: 用于进行栅格矢量化操作的栅格影像。

args.name: extra
args.description: 添加额外的GDAL命令行选项。

args.name: field
args.description: 指定连通区域的属性的字段名称。

args.name: band
args.description: 如果栅格是多波段，请选择要使用的波段。

args.name: eightConnectedness
args.description: 如果未设置，则栅格单元必须具有公共边界才能被视为连接（四向连通）。如果设置，则接触的栅格单元也被视为已连接（八向连通）。

definitionJson.name: Coverage.polygonizeByGDAL
definitionJson.author: QGIS
definitionJson.description: 将输入栅格数据转换为矢量多边形数据。该算子可自动将相同像元值的连通区域合并为多边形，并支持将栅格属性（如像元值）保留为矢量图层的属性字段。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Convert input raster data to vector polygon data. This operator can automatically merge connected areas with the same cell values ​​into polygons, and supports retaining raster attributes (such as cell values) as attribute fields of vector layers.

sampleCode:
import oge

# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()
# 读取数据
ls8 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
b3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B3"])

# 裁剪栅格
feature = service.getProcess("Feature_deprecated.polygon").execute("[[[114.63,30.61], [114.88,30.61], [114.88,30.93],[114.63,30.61]]]", "{a:10}", "EPSG:4326")
b3_clip = service.getProcess("Coverage.clipRasterByMaskLayerByGDAL").execute(b3,feature,"True","","False","","","False","False","","False","0","")
# 调用函数处理数据
res = service.getProcess("Coverage.polygonizeByGDAL").execute(b3_clip, "", "DN", 1, "False")
# 重投影至地理坐标系
res_reproject = service.getProcess("Feature_deprecated.reproject").execute(res,"EPSG:4326")

# 设置渲染模式，其中"min":-1代表将-1映射到png图像的0，"max": 1代表将1映射到png图像的255，
# "palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]设置了渲染模式

# 输出结果

name: Coverage.reclass
description: 根据特定的规则或需求，将栅格数据中的像元值进行重新分类、归并或赋予新值的操作过程。
descriptionEn: The operation process of reclassifying, merging or assigning new values to the pixel values in raster data according to specific rules or requirements.

args.name: coverage
args.description: 用于重分类的栅格数据。

args.name: rules
args.description: 重分类规则。

args.description: 输入栅格的Nan值。

definitionJson.name: Coverage.reclass
definitionJson.author: OGE
definitionJson.description: 根据特定的规则或需求，将栅格数据中的像元值进行重新分类、归并或赋予新值的操作过程。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: The operation process of reclassifying, merging or assigning new values to the pixel values in raster data according to specific rules or requirements.

sampleCode:
import oge

# ========== 初始化 ==========
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

# ========== 1. 加载栅格数据（以 DEM 为例）==========
dem = service.getCoverage(coverageID="ASTGTM_N43E084", productID="ASTER_GDEM_DEM30")

# ========== 2. 定义重分类规则 ==========
# 规则格式为 (min_value, max_value, new_value)
# 例如：将高程 0–2000m 设为1，2000–3000m设为2，3000–4500m设为3，>4500m设为4
rules = [
    (0.0, 2000.0, 1.0),
    (2000.0, 3000.0, 2.0),
    (3000.0, 4500.0, 3.0),
    (4500.0, 9999.0, 4.0)
]

# ========== 3. 执行重分类 ==========
# NaN_value 表示无效值，可设为 -9999 或 0
reclass_result = service.getProcess("Coverage.reclass").execute(dem, rules, 0)

# ========== 4. 设置可视化参数 ==========
vis_params = {
    "min": 1.0,
    "max": 4.0,
    "palette": ["yellow", "green", "red", "blue"]
}

# ========== 5. 显示结果 ==========
reclass_result.styles(vis_params).getMap("DEM 重分类结果")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(84, 43, 8)

name: Coverage.gridLinearByGDAL
description: 线性方法通过计算点云的Delaunay三角剖分来执行线性插值，找出点在三角剖分的哪个三角形中，并从三角形内的质心坐标进行线性插值。
descriptionEn: The Linear method performs linear interpolation by computing a Delaunay triangulation of the point cloud, finding in which triangle of the triangulation of the point is, and by doing linear interpolation from its barycentric coordinates within the triangle.

args.name: input
args.description: 输入用于网格化操作的矢量数据。

args.name: radius
args.description: 当待插值点未落入任何Delaunay三角网的三角形内时，将使用指定最大距离搜索最近邻点进行插值，否则填充无数据值。若该参数设为-1，则搜索距离为无限大；若设为0，将直接使用无数据值填充。

args.name: extra
args.description: 添加额外的GDAL命令行选项。

args.name: nodata
args.description: 定义没有栅格像元值的背景值或无效值。

args.name: zField
args.description: 用于插值的字段。

args.name: dataType
args.description: 定义输出栅格文件的数据类型。

args.name: options
args.description: 用于添加一个或多个控制要创建的栅格的创建选项。

definitionJson.name: Coverage.gridLinearByGDAL
definitionJson.author: QGIS
definitionJson.description: 线性方法通过计算点云的Delaunay三角剖分来执行线性插值，找出点在三角剖分的哪个三角形中，并从三角形内的质心坐标进行线性插值。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: The Linear method performs linear interpolation by computing a Delaunay triangulation of the point cloud, finding in which triangle of the triangulation of the point is, and by doing linear interpolation from its barycentric coordinates within the triangle.

sampleCode:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()
# 创建多个点要素
feature = service.getProcess("Feature_deprecated.multiPoint").execute([[38, 10.10], [38,10.5], [38.5, 10.10], [38.5,10.5]], "{a:10}", "EPSG:4326")
# 线性插值
result = service.getProcess("Coverage.gridLinearByGDAL").execute(feature, 1, "", 0.0, "a", "6", "")
# 可视化
vis_params = {"min": 0, "max": 100,
              "palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]}
result.styles(vis_params).getMap("result")
feature.styles(["#111111"]).getMap("points")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(38.255,10.29,9)
author: QGIS

name: Coverage.resample
description: 对输入栅格数据进行重采样，通过改变空间分辨率、像元大小或网格对齐方式，生成新的栅格数据。
descriptionEn: Resamples input raster data to generate new raster data by changing the spatial resolution, cell size, or grid alignment.

args.name: coverage
args.description: 用于重采样的栅格数据。

args.name: level
args.description: 重采样级别。例如：1 表示上采样，-1 表示下采样。

args.name: mode
args.description: 使用的插值模式。

definitionJson.name: Coverage.resample
definitionJson.author: BLOCK
definitionJson.description: 对输入栅格数据进行重采样，通过改变空间分辨率、像元大小或网格对齐方式，生成新的栅格数据。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Resamples input raster data to generate new raster data by changing the spatial resolution, cell size, or grid alignment.

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()
# 读取数据
lc08 = service.getCoverage(
    coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
# 调用函数处理数据
ndwi = service.getProcess("Coverage.resample").execute(lc08, 1, "B1")

# 设置渲染模式，其中"min":-1代表将-1映射到png图像的0，max": 1代表将1映射到png图像的255，"palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]设置了渲染模式

vis_params = {}

# 输出结果
ndwi.styles(vis_params).getMap("ndwi")
# 设置前端地图中心位置和显示层级
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.28, 30.57, 9)

name: SpatialStats.STCorrelations.SpatialAutoCorrelation.localMoranI
description: 用于识别研究区域内，每个特定空间单元与其周边单元在某一属性值上的空间关联模式、聚集位置及异常值。它是对全局莫兰指数的细化与空间分解，能够揭示隐藏在整体模式下的局部异质性。
descriptionEn: It is used to identify the spatial correlation patterns, aggregation locations and outliers on a certain attribute value between each specific spatial unit and its surrounding units in the study area. It is a refinement and spatial decomposition of the global Moran index, which can reveal the local heterogeneity hidden in the overall pattern.

args.name: featureRDD
args.description: 用于进行局部莫兰指数运算操作的数据。

args.name: property
args.description: 用于计算的属性值。

args.name: adjust
args.description: 是否对样本量n进行调整，以校正计算中的偏差，默认为不调整。

definitionJson.name: SpatialStats.STCorrelations.SpatialAutoCorrelation.localMoranI
definitionJson.author: OGE
definitionJson.description: 用于识别研究区域内，每个特定空间单元与其周边单元在某一属性值上的空间关联模式、聚集位置及异常值。它是对全局莫兰指数的细化与空间分解，能够揭示隐藏在整体模式下的局部异质性。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: It is used to identify the spatial correlation patterns, aggregation locations and outliers on a certain attribute value between each specific spatial unit and its surrounding units in the study area. It is a refinement and spatial decomposition of the global Moran index, which can reveal the local heterogeneity hidden in the overall pattern.

import oge

NDVI = service.getCoverage(coverageID="OGE_Case_Data/NDVI500.tif")
EVI = service.getCoverage(coverageID="OGE_Case_Data/EVI500.tif")

GPP = service.getCoverage(coverageID="OGE_Case_Data/GPP500.tif")
NPP = service.getCoverage(coverageID="OGE_Case_Data/NPP500.tif")
ALBEDO = service.getCoverage(coverageID="OGE_Case_Data/ALBEDO500.tif")
COPY = service.getCoverage(coverageID="OGE_Case_Data/LAI500.tif")

name: Coverage.gridInverseDistanceByGDAL
alias: 网格化（距离倒数乘方法）
description: 网格化（距离倒数乘方法），即反距离权重插值法，是一种基于空间邻近相似性原理的确定性空间插值方法。该方法通过遍历目标区域的每一个网格节点，计算其估计值，最终生成一个连续的、覆盖整个区域的规则栅格表面。
descriptionEn: Gridding (reciprocal distance multiplication method), that is, inverse distance weighted interpolation method, is a deterministic spatial interpolation method based on the principle of spatial proximity similarity. This method traverses each grid node in the target area, calculates its estimated value, and finally generates a continuous regular grid surface covering the entire area.

args.name: input
args.description: 输入用于网格化操作的矢量数据。

args.name: extra
args.description: 添加额外的GDAL命令行选项。

args.name: power
args.description: 控制权重随距离衰减的速度。

args.name: angle
args.description: 椭圆旋转的角度（以度为单位）。椭圆逆时针旋转。

args.name: radius2
args.description: 搜索椭圆的第二个半径（如果旋转角度为0，则为Y轴）。

args.name: radius1
args.description: 搜索椭圆的第一个半径（如果旋转角度为0，则为X轴）。

args.name: smoothing
args.description: 防止在插值点无限接近采样点时权重趋于无穷大。

args.name: maxPoints
args.description: 在搜索半径内，参与每个网格节点插值计算的最大最近邻样本点数量。

args.name: minPoints
args.description: 要平均的最小数据点数量。如果发现的点数量较少，则网格节点被视为空，并将用NODATA标记填充。

args.name: nodata
args.description: 定义没有栅格像元值的背景值或无效值。

args.name: zField
args.description: 用于插值的字段。

args.name: dataType
args.description: 定义输出栅格文件的数据类型。

args.name: options
args.description: 用于添加一个或多个控制要创建的栅格的创建选项。

definitionJson.name: Coverage.gridInverseDistanceByGDAL
definitionJson.author: QGIS
definitionJson.alias: 网格化（距离倒数乘方法）
definitionJson.description: 网格化（距离倒数乘方法），即反距离权重插值法，是一种基于空间邻近相似性原理的确定性空间插值方法。该方法通过遍历目标区域的每一个网格节点，计算其估计值，最终生成一个连续的、覆盖整个区域的规则栅格表面。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Gridding (reciprocal distance multiplication method), that is, inverse distance weighted interpolation method, is a deterministic spatial interpolation method based on the principle of spatial proximity similarity. This method traverses each grid node in the target area, calculates its estimated value, and finally generates a continuous regular grid surface covering the entire area.

name: Coverage.binarization
description: 二值化是一种图像处理和数据分析技术，其核心是将一个具有多个（或连续）数值的灰度图像或数据集，通过设定一个或多个阈值，转换为一个仅包含两种可能值（通常是0和1，或黑和白）的图像或数据集。
descriptionEn: Binarization is an image processing and data analysis technology. Its core is to convert a grayscale image or data set with multiple (or continuous) values ​​into an image or data set containing only two possible values ​​(usually 0 and 1, or black and white) by setting one or more thresholds.

args.name: coverage
args.description: The coverage from which the left operand bands are taken

args.name: threshold
args.description: threshold

definitionJson.name: Coverage.binarization
definitionJson.author: OGE
definitionJson.description: 二值化是一种图像处理和数据分析技术，其核心是将一个具有多个（或连续）数值的灰度图像或数据集，通过设定一个或多个阈值，转换为一个仅包含两种可能值（通常是0和1，或黑和白）的图像或数据集。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Binarization is an image processing and data analysis technology. Its core is to convert a grayscale image or data set with multiple (or continuous) values ​​into an image or data set containing only two possible values ​​(usually 0 and 1, or black and white) by setting one or more thresholds.

sampleCode:
import oge

# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

# 读取数据
lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
lc08 = service.getProcess("Coverage.toFloat").execute(lc08)
# 调⽤函数处理数据
ndvi = service.getProcess("Coverage.normalizedDifference").execute(lc08, ["B5", "B4"])
ndvi = service.getProcess("Coverage.multiplyNum").execute(ndvi, 100.0)
# 二值化
Ndvi_binarization = service.getProcess("Coverage.binarization").execute(ndvi, 3)
# 中值滤波
Ndvi_binarization_Median = service.getProcess("Coverage.focalMedian").execute(Ndvi_binarization,"square",1)
# 设置渲染模式
vis_params = { "palette": ["black","white"]}
# 输出结果
Ndvi_binarization_Median.styles(vis_params).getMap("NDVI")
# 设置前端地图中⼼位置
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.28, 30.57, 9)

sampleCode:
import oge

# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()
# 读取数据
lc08 = service.getCoverage(
    coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
# 选取波段
b5 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08, ["B5"])
b5 = service.getProcess("Coverage.subtractNum").execute(b5, 15000)
# 调用函数处理数据
a = service.getProcess("Coverage.signum").execute(b5)
a = service.getProcess("Coverage.pow").execute(b5,a)
# 设置渲染模式，其中"min":-1代表将-1映射到png图像的0，max": 1代表将1映射到png图像的255，"palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]设置了渲染模式

vis_params = {}

# 输出结果
a.styles(vis_params).getMap("a")
# 设置前端地图中心位置和显示层级

definitionJson.name: FeatureCollection.geoHash
definitionJson.description: 将二维经纬度坐标编码映射为GeoHash编码
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Encode 2D latitude-longitude coordinates into a GeoHash string

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute("[[35.1, 15.7], [36.3, 15.9], [37.5, 15.6]]","EPSG:4326")
feature1 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry1, "{a:10}")

geometry2 = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute("[[35.2, 12.1], [36.4, 12.0], [37.6, 12.3]]","EPSG:4326")
feature2 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry2, "{a:15}")

# 构建集合并计算GeoHash编码
featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute([feature1, feature2])
result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.geoHash").execute(featureCollection, "geom",10)

first_geohash = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.aggregateFirst").execute(result, "geohash")
# 打印结果
first_geohash.log("第一个要素的GeoHash结果")


# 设置样式与地图展示
result.styles(["#FF0000"]).getMap("geoHash")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(36.5, 14.0, 5)

kernel = service.getProcess("Kernel.circle").execute(1,False,1)
kernel = service.getProcess("Kernel.inverse").execute(kernel)
a = service.getProcess("Coverage.convolve").execute(b3,kernel)

vis_params = {"min": -1, "max": 1, "palette": ["#808080", "#949494", "#a9a9a9", "#bdbebd", "#d3d3d3","#e9e9e9"]}
a.styles(vis_params).getMap("a")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.30, 30.608, 10)

name: SpatialStats.STCorrelations.SpatialAutoCorrelation.globalMoranI
description: 用于判断某种地理现象（如经济水平、污染浓度、疾病发病率）的空间分布在整体上呈现聚集、离散还是随机模式，为空间结构的存在性提供第一个关键证据。

definitionJson.description: 为空间要素（点、线、面）创建一定距离范围内的多边形区域。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Create a polygonal buffer zone within a specified distance around spatial features (points, lines, or polygons).

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute([[35.1, 15.7], [36.3, 15.9], [37.5, 15.6]],"EPSG:4326")
feature1 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry1, "{a:10}")

geometry2 = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute([[35.2, 12.1], [36.4, 12.0], [37.6, 12.3]],"EPSG:4326")
feature2 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry2, "{a:15}")

# 构建集合并计算缓冲区
featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute([feature1, feature2])
result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.buffer").execute(featureCollection, 1)

# 设置样式与地图展示
result.styles(["#FF0000"]).getMap("buffer")
featureCollection.styles(["#FFFF00"]).getMap("featureCollection")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(36.5, 14.0, 5)

sampleCode:
import oge

# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()
# 读取数据
ls8 = service.getCoverage(
coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
b3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B3"])
b2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B2"])

# 调用函数处理数据
a = service.getProcess("Coverage.neq").execute(b3, b2)

# 设置渲染模式，其中"min":-1代表将-1映射到png图像的0，"max": 1代表将1映射到png图像的255，
# "palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]设置了渲染模式

vis_params = {
"palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]}

# 输出结果
a.styles(vis_params).getMap("a")
# 设置前端地图中心位置和显示层级
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.28, 30.57, 9)
author: OGE

name: Kernel.prewitt
description: 它通过计算图像在水平和垂直方向的灰度梯度近似值来检测边缘。该算子使用简单的均值差分来近似一阶偏导数，是所有3×3边缘检测算子中结构最简单、计算最直接的一种。
descriptionEn: It detects edges by calculating an approximation of the grayscale gradient of the image in the horizontal and vertical directions. This operator uses simple mean difference to approximate the first-order partial derivative. It is the simplest structure and the most direct calculation among all 3×3 edge detection operators.

args.name: normalize
args.description: 将核值归一化为总和为1。

args.name: magnitude
args.description: 按照用户自定义数值，缩放卷积核每个值。

definitionJson.name: Kernel.prewitt
definitionJson.description: 它通过计算图像在水平和垂直方向的灰度梯度近似值来检测边缘。该算子使用简单的均值差分来近似一阶偏导数，是所有3×3边缘检测算子中结构最简单、计算最直接的一种。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: It detects edges by calculating an approximation of the grayscale gradient of the image in the horizontal and vertical directions. This operator uses simple mean difference to approximate the first-order partial derivative. It is the simplest structure and the most direct calculation among all 3×3 edge detection operators.

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化OGE服务
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
ls8 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
b3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B3"])
# 设定 Prewitt 卷积核的参数
# 调用 Kernel.prewitt 生成 3x3 的 Prewitt 边缘检测卷积核
kernel = service.getProcess("Kernel.prewitt").execute(True, 1.0)
a = service.getProcess("Coverage.convolve").execute(b3,kernel)
# 打印生成的卷积核
vis_params = {"min": -1, "max": 1, "palette": ["#808080", "#949494", "#a9a9a9", "#bdbebd", "#d3d3d3","#e9e9e9"]}
a.styles(vis_params).getMap("a")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.30, 30.608, 10)

name: Kernel.sobel
description: 生成一个3×3的Sobel边缘检测卷积核。通过计算图像在水平和垂直方向的加权梯度近似值来检测边缘，在抗噪性与边缘定位精度之间取得了优秀的平衡。
descriptionEn: Generate a 3×3 Sobel edge detection convolution kernel. Edges are detected by calculating a weighted gradient approximation of the image in the horizontal and vertical directions, achieving an excellent balance between noise immunity and edge localization accuracy.

args.name: axis
args.description: 指定卷积核的方向，可选：x或者y。

definitionJson.name: Kernel.sobel
definitionJson.description: 生成一个3×3的Sobel边缘检测卷积核。通过计算图像在水平和垂直方向的加权梯度近似值来检测边缘，在抗噪性与边缘定位精度之间取得了优秀的平衡。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Generate a 3×3 Sobel edge detection convolution kernel. Edges are detected by calculating a weighted gradient approximation of the image in the horizontal and vertical directions, achieving an excellent balance between noise immunity and edge localization accuracy.

name: Coverage.entropy
description: 使用以每个输入像素为中心的指定内核计算加窗熵。熵计算为-sum(p * log2(p))，其中p是每个窗口中遇到的值出现的归一化概率。
descriptionEn: Computes the windowed entropy using the specified kernel centered on each input pixel Entropy is calculated as sum (p * log2 (p)), where p is the normalized probability of occurrence of the values accounted in each window

args.name: coverage
args.description: The coverage to compute the entropy.

args.name: radius
args.description: The radius of the square neighborhood to compute the entropy, 1 for a 3??3 square.

name: Coverage.meanShiftSmoothingByOTB
description: Coverage.meanShiftSmoothingByOTB

args.name: input
args.description: Name of input raster map

args.name: spatialr
args.description: Radius of the spatial neighborhood for averaging. Higher values will result in more smoothing and higher processing time.

args.name: ranger
args.description: Threshold on spectral signature euclidean distance (expressed in radiometry unit) to consider neighborhood pixel for averaging. Higher values will be less edge-preserving (more similar to simple average in neighborhood), whereas lower values will result in less noise smoothing.

args.name: thres
args.description: Algorithm will stop if update of average spectral signature and spatial position is below this threshold.

args.name: maxiter
args.description: Algorithm will stop if convergence threshold is not met after the maximum number of iterations.

args.name: rangeramp
args.description: Vary the range radius linearly with the central pixel intensity (experimental).

definitionJson.name: Coverage.meanShiftSmoothingByOTB
definitionJson.author: OGE
definitionJson.description: Coverage.meanShiftSmoothingByOTB

sampleCode:
import oge

    lc08,   # input
    5,      # spatialr（默认=5）
    15,     # ranger（默认=15）
    0.1,    # thres（默认=0.1）

result.styles(vis_params).getMap("smooth")

name: Kernel.laplacian4
description: 通过离散近似计算图像函数的二阶导数，从而对图像中像素强度的快速变化区域（如边缘、角点）进行高灵敏度响应，同时对均匀区域（平坦区）的响应为零。其“4”表示该算子使用中心像素的4个直接相邻像素（上、下、左、右）进行计算，是拉普拉斯算子的4邻域离散形式。
descriptionEn: The second-order derivative of the image function is calculated through discrete approximation, resulting in a highly sensitive response to rapidly changing areas of pixel intensity in the image (such as edges, corners), while the response to uniform areas (flat areas) is zero. The "4" indicates that the operator uses the 4 directly adjacent pixels (upper, lower, left, and right) of the central pixel for calculation, which is the 4-neighbor discrete form of the Laplacian operator.

definitionJson.name: Kernel.laplacian4
definitionJson.description: 通过离散近似计算图像函数的二阶导数，从而对图像中像素强度的快速变化区域（如边缘、角点）进行高灵敏度响应，同时对均匀区域（平坦区）的响应为零。其“4”表示该算子使用中心像素的4个直接相邻像素（上、下、左、右）进行计算，是拉普拉斯算子的4邻域离散形式。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: The second-order derivative of the image function is calculated through discrete approximation, resulting in a highly sensitive response to rapidly changing areas of pixel intensity in the image (such as edges, corners), while the response to uniform areas (flat areas) is zero. The "4" indicates that the operator uses the 4 directly adjacent pixels (upper, lower, left, and right) of the central pixel for calculation, which is the 4-neighbor discrete form of the Laplacian operator.

name: Coverage.rgbToPctByGDAL
description: 将24位RGB图像转换为8位调色板。在下采样RGB直方图上使用中值切割算法计算给定RGB图像的最佳伪色表。然后使用颜色表将图像转换为伪彩色图像。这种转换利用Floyd-Steinberg抖动(误差扩散)来最大化输出图像的视觉质量。
descriptionEn: Converts a 24 bit RGB image into an 8 bit tablet Computes an optimal pseudo color table for the given RGB image using a media cut algorithm on a downsampled RGB histogram Then it converts the image into a pseudo colored image using the color table This conversion utilizes Floyd Steinberg editing (error diffusion) to maximize output image visual quality

args.name: input
args.description: Input (RGB) raster layer

args.name: ncolors
args.description: The number of colors the resulting image will contain. A value from 2-256 is possible.

definitionJson.name: Coverage.rgbToPctByGDAL
definitionJson.author: QGIS
definitionJson.description: 将24位RGB图像转换为8位调色板。在下采样RGB直方图上使用中值切割算法计算给定RGB图像的最佳伪色表。然后使用颜色表将图像转换为伪彩色图像。这种转换利用Floyd-Steinberg抖动(误差扩散)来最大化输出图像的视觉质量。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Converts a 24 bit RGB image into an 8 bit tablet Computes an optimal pseudo color table for the given RGB image using a media cut algorithm on a downsampled RGB histogram Then it converts the image into a pseudo colored image using the color table This conversion utilizes Floyd Steinberg editing (error diffusion) to maximize output image visual quality

sampleCode:
import oge

# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()
# 读取数据
coverage = service.getCoverage(coverageID="ASTGTM_N28E056", productID="ASTER_GDEM_DEM30")

# 调用函数处理数据
ndvi = service.getProcess("Coverage.viewshedByGrass").execute(coverage,"56.50,28.60","1.75","0.0","-1","0.14286")

# 设置渲染模式，其中"min":-1代表将-1映射到png图像的0，max": 1代表将1映射到png图像的255，"palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]设置了渲染模式

vis_params = {'min': -1, 'max': 1,"palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]}

# 输出结果
ndvi.styles(vis_params).getMap("ndvi")
# 设置前端地图中心位置和显示层级
oge.mapclient.centerMap(56.25, 28.40, 8)

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]],"EPSG:4326")
feature1 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry1, "{a:10}")

geometry2 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[38, 10], [38, 15], [43, 15], [43, 10], [38, 10]]],"EPSG:4326")
feature2 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry2, "{b:10}")
intersection = service.getProcess("Feature.intersection").execute(feature1,feature2,"EPSG:4326")
intersection.styles(["#111111"]).getMap("intersection")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(37,12,5)

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute([[35.1, 15.7], [36.3, 15.9], [37.5, 15.6]],"EPSG:4326")
feature1 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry1, "{a:10}")

geometry2 = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute([[35.2, 12.1], [36.4, 12.0], [37.6, 12.3]],"EPSG:4326")
feature2 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry2, "{a:15}")

# 构建集合并计算Delaunay三角网
featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute([feature1, feature2])
result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.delaunay").execute(featureCollection, "geom")

# 设置样式与地图展示
featureCollection.styles(["#000000"]).getMap("featureCollection")
result.styles(["#FF0000"]).getMap("result")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(36.5, 14.0, 5)

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute([[35.1, 15.7], [36.3, 15.9], [37.5, 15.6]],"EPSG:4326")
feature1 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry1, "{a: 10, b: 3}")

geometry2 = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute([[35.2, 12.1], [36.4, 12.0], [37.6, 12.3]],"EPSG:4326")
feature2 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry2, "{a: 15, b: 7}")

# 构建集合并计算数值类型列值和
featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute([feature1, feature2])
combine_result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.combine").execute(featureCollection,"a","b","res")

# 设置样式与地图展示
combine_result.styles(["#FF0000"]).getMap("combine_result")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(36.5, 14.0, 5)

name: CoverageArray.multiply
description: CoverageArray.multiply

definitionJson.description: Multiplies the first value by the second. If either image of the CoverageArray or image has only 1 band, then it is used against all the bands in the other image. If the images have the same number of bands, but not the same names, they're used pairwise in the natural order. The output bands are named for the longer of the two inputs, or if they're equal in length, in image1's order. The type of the output pixels is the union of the input types.

args.name: coverageArray
args.description: The image from which the left operand bands are taken.

args.name: coverage
args.description: The image from which the right operand bands are taken.

feature2 = service.getProcess("Feature_deprecated.point").execute("[38,10.11]", "{Te:11}", "EPSG:4326")
feature3 = service.getProcess("Feature_deprecated.point").execute("[38,10.12]", "{Te:12}", "EPSG:4326")
feature4 = service.getProcess("Feature_deprecated.point").execute("[38.01,10.10]", "{Te:13}", "EPSG:4326")
feature5 = service.getProcess("Feature_deprecated.point").execute("[38.01,10.11]", "{Te:14}", "EPSG:4326")
feature6 = service.getProcess("Feature_deprecated.point").execute("[38.01,10.12]", "{Te:15}", "EPSG:4326")
fc = service.getProcess("Feature_deprecated.featureCollection").execute([feature1,feature2,feature3,feature4,feature5,feature6])

vis_params = {"min": 0, "max": 100,

name: Coverage.mod
alias: 用其他影像替换像元值
aliasEn: Replace pixel values with other images
description: 将image1和image2中每个匹配的波段对的第一个值修改为第二个值。如果image1或image2只有1个波段，则将其用于另一个图像中的所有波段。如果图像具有相同数量的波段，但名称不相同，则按自然顺序成对使用。输出波段以两个输入中较长的一个来命名，如果它们的长度相等，则按image1的顺序命名。输出像素的类型是输入类型的并集。
descriptionEn: Mods the first value to the second for each matched pair of bands in image1 and image2 If either image1 or image2 has only 1 band, then it is used to resist all the bands in the other image If the images have the same number of bands, but not the same names, they're used pairwise in the natural order The output bands are named for the longer of the two inputs, or if they are equal in length, in image1's order The type of the output pixels is the union of the input types

args.name: coverage1
args.description: The image from which the left operand bands are taken.

args.name: coverage2
args.description: The image from which the right operand bands are taken.

feature2 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry2, "{a:10, b:20}")

feature2.styles(["#111111"]).getMap("feature2")

definitionJson.name: FeatureCollection.aggregateCount
definitionJson.description: 统计要素集合中元素的数量，可基于指定属性字段进行统计。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Count elements in a feature collection, optionally based on a specified property field.

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
# 多边形坐标 + 属性列表
data = [
    ([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]], "10"),
    ([[[38, 10], [38, 15], [43, 15], [43, 10], [38, 10]]], "20"),
    ([[[36, 11], [36, 14], [39, 14], [39, 11], [36, 11]]], "30"),
    ([[[34, 12], [34, 14], [37, 14], [37, 12], [34, 12]]], "40")
]
# 批量创建 features
features = []
for coords, attr in data:
    geometry = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute(coords, "EPSG:4326")
    feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry, f"{{a:{attr}}}")
    features.append(feature)
# 构建 FeatureCollection
featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute(features)

result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.aggregateCount").execute(featureCollection,"a")
result.log("result")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(37, 12, 5)

sampleCode:
import oge
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

# 1. 获取影像
ls8 = service.getCoverage(
    coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00",
    productID="LC08_L1T"
)

# 2. 选择一个波段，可根据需要修改，这里以 B3 为例
b3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B3"])

# 3. 调用 Coverage.sieveByGDAL 进行消除分析

sieved = service.getProcess("Coverage.sieveByGDAL").execute(b3,10,"False","False","","")

# 4. 可视化样式
vis_params = {"min": 0,"max": 30000,"palette": ["#000000", "#555555", "#AAAAAA", "#FFFFFF"]}

# 5. 显示结果
sieved.styles(vis_params).getMap("SieveByGDAL_Result")

name: FeatureCollection.simpleKriging
description: 简单克里金法是一种基于地统计学的空间插值技术，它用于根据一组已知的、空间上分散的样本点数据，来预测未知位置点的数值。
descriptionEn: Simple kriging method is a spatial interpolation technique based on geostatistics, which is used to predict the values of unknown points according to a group of known and spatially dispersed sample points.

args.name: collection
args.description: 用于简单克里金插值操作的矢量要素集合。

args.name: propertyName
args.description: 目标属性字段名称。

args.name: cols
args.description: 生成的栅格数据的列数。

args.name: rows
args.description: 生成的栅格数据的行数。

args.name: defaultValue
args.description: 使用此默认值替换缺失或无效的值（例如负值）。

definitionJson.name: FeatureCollection.simpleKriging
definitionJson.description: 简单克里金法是一种基于地统计学的空间插值技术，它用于根据一组已知的、空间上分散的样本点数据，来预测未知位置点的数值。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Simple kriging method is a spatial interpolation technique based on geostatistics, which is used to predict the values of unknown points according to a group of known and spatially dispersed sample points.

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化服务
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
# 点坐标 + 属性值
data = [
    ([36, 11], "10"),
    ([39, 11], "20"),
    ([37, 13], "30"),
    ([35, 13], "40")
]
# 构建点 Feature 列表
features = []
for coord, attr in data:
    point = service.getProcess("Geometry.Point").execute(coord, "EPSG:4326")
    feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(point, f"{{a:{attr}}}")
    features.append(feature)
# 构建 FeatureCollection
featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute(features)
# 执行 IDW 插值（字段名为 'a'）
interpolated = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.simpleKriging").execute(featureCollection,"a",256,256)
# 可视化插值结果
vis_params = {"min": 0, "max": 1}
interpolated.styles(vis_params).getMap("simpleKriging")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(37, 12, 5)

name: FeatureCollection.idwInterpolation
description: 反距离加权插值是一种常用且直观的空间插值方法，主要用于根据已知离散点的数值来估算未知点的数值。其核心思想是：距离未知点越近的已知点，对其估计值的影响（权重）就越大；距离越远，影响则越小。
descriptionEn: Inverse distance weighted interpolation is a commonly used and intuitive spatial interpolation method, which is mainly used to estimate the value of unknown points based on the value of known discrete points. The core idea is that the closer the known point is to the unknown point, the greater the influence (weight) it has on its estimate; the farther the distance, the smaller the influence.

args.name: collection
args.description: 用于反距离加权插值操作的矢量要素集合。

args.name: propertyName
args.description: 目标属性字段名称。

args.name: maskGeom
args.description: 用于裁剪插值结果的多边形区域。

args.name: cols
args.description: 生成的栅格数据的列数。

args.name: rows
args.description: 生成的栅格数据的行数。

args.name: defaultValue
args.description: 使用此默认值替换缺失或无效的值（例如负值）。

definitionJson.name: FeatureCollection.idwInterpolation
definitionJson.description: 反距离加权插值是一种常用且直观的空间插值方法，主要用于根据已知离散点的数值来估算未知点的数值。其核心思想是：距离未知点越近的已知点，对其估计值的影响（权重）就越大；距离越远，影响则越小。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Inverse distance weighted interpolation is a commonly used and intuitive spatial interpolation method, which is mainly used to estimate the value of unknown points based on the value of known discrete points. The core idea is that the closer the known point is to the unknown point, the greater the influence (weight) it has on its estimate; the farther the distance, the smaller the influence.

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化服务
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
# 点坐标 + 属性值
data = [
    ([36, 11], "10"),
    ([39, 11], "20"),
    ([37, 13], "30"),
    ([35, 13], "40")
]
# 构建点 Feature 列表
features = []
for coord, attr in data:
    point = service.getProcess("Geometry.Point").execute(coord, "EPSG:4326")
    feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(point, f"{{a:{attr}}}")
    features.append(feature)
# 构建 FeatureCollection
featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute(features)
# 构建maskGeom
maskGeom = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[36, 11],[39, 11],[37, 13],[35, 13],[36, 11]]], "EPSG:4326")
# 执行 IDW 插值（字段名为 'a'）
interpolated = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.idwInterpolation").execute(featureCollection,"a",maskGeom)
# 可视化插值结果
vis_params = {"min": 0, "max": 1}
interpolated.styles(vis_params).getMap("IDW")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(37, 12, 5)

sampleCode:
import oge

# 1. 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

# 2. 加载特征影像与标签影像
lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
lc08_select = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08, ["B1", "B2", "B3", "B4"])
lc08_label = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08, ["B5"])

# 3. 训练广义线性回归模型 GLM
model = service.getProcess("Coverage.generalizedLinearRegressionModel").execute(
    lc08_select,   # featuresCoverage
    lc08_label,      # labelCoverage
    0.3,            # regParam
    "gaussian",     # family
    "identity",     # link
    10,             # maxIter
    True,           # fitIntercept
    1,              # linkPower
    "irls",         # solver
    0.000001,       # tol
    0.0             # variancePower
)

# 4. 导出模型
model.export("model")

import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()
# 读取数据
ls8 = service.getCoverage(
coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
b3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B3"])
b2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B2"])

# 调用函数处理数据
ndwi = service.getProcess(
"Coverage.or").execute(b3, b2)

# 设置渲染模式，其中"min":-1代表将-1映射到png图像的0，"max": 1代表将1映射到png图像的255，

"palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]}

#获取复制结果的所有属性名
propertyNames= service.getProcess("Feature.propertyNames").execute(copyResult)
#打印
propertyNames.log("propertyNames")

#可视化
destinationFeature.styles(["#000000"]).getMap("destinationFeature")
sourceFeature.styles(["#111111"]).getMap("sourceFeature")
copyResult.styles(["#222222"]).getMap("copyResult")

descriptionEn: Performs a union operation on two vector features, producing a new feature whose geometry represents the full spatial extent of both inputs. The operator overlays the two geometries, subdividing them into all possible spatial units.

args.name: feature1
args.description: 用于并集分析的第一要素。

args.name: feature2
args.description: 用于并集分析的第二要素。

args.name: crs
args.description: 矢量要素的坐标参考系统。

definitionJson.name: Feature.union
definitionJson.author: OGE
definitionJson.description: 对两个矢量要素执行联合运算，输出一个新的矢量要素，其空间范围等于两个输入要素几何的全集合。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Performs a union operation on two vector features, producing a new feature whose geometry represents the full spatial extent of both inputs. The operator overlays the two geometries, subdividing them into all possible spatial units.

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
# 加载矢量
geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]],"EPSG:4326")
feature1 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry1, "{a:10}")

geometry2 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[38, 10], [38, 15], [43, 15], [43, 10], [38, 10]]],"EPSG:4326")
feature2 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry2, "{b:15}")

union = service.getProcess("Feature.union").execute(feature1,feature2,"EPSG:4326")
union.styles(["#FF1111"]).getMap("union")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(37,12,5)
author: OGE

name: FeatureCollection.aggregateTotalSD
description: 计算要素集合中指定数值属性字段的总体标准差（Population Standard Deviation）。
descriptionEn: Calculate the population standard deviation for a specified numeric property in a feature collection.

output.name: output
output.description: 指定属性字段的总体标准差

args.name: collection
args.description: 输入要素集合（DataFrame / FeatureCollection）

args.name: property
args.description: 用于计算总体标准差的数值型属性字段名称

definitionJson.name: FeatureCollection.aggregateTotalSD
definitionJson.description: 计算要素集合中指定数值属性字段的总体标准差（Population Standard Deviation）。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Calculate the population standard deviation for a specified numeric property in a feature collection.

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
# 多边形坐标 + 属性列表
data = [
    ([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]], "10"),
    ([[[38, 10], [38, 15], [43, 15], [43, 10], [38, 10]]], "20"),
    ([[[36, 11], [36, 14], [39, 14], [39, 11], [36, 11]]], "30"),
    ([[[34, 12], [34, 14], [37, 14], [37, 12], [34, 12]]], "40")
]
# 批量创建 features
features = []
for coords, attr in data:
    geometry = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute(coords, "EPSG:4326")
    feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry, f"{{a:{attr}}}")
    features.append(feature)
# 构建 FeatureCollection
featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute(features)

result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.aggregateTotalSD").execute(featureCollection,"a")
result.log("population_standard_deviation")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(37, 12, 5)

name: FeatureCollection.difference
description: 对输入的要素集合执行差异空间分析运算。该算子将目标要素集合的几何与另一个要素集合的几何进行空间差异计算，返回目标要素中存在但在对比要素中不存在的空间部分。

args.name: geometryFieldName2
args.description: Collection2的几何字段名称。

import oge

service = oge.Service.initialize()

import oge

geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute([[35.1, 15.7], [36.3, 15.9], [37.5, 15.6]],"EPSG:4326")

name: Coverage.trainImagesRegressionSharkrfByOTB
description: Coverage.trainImagesRegressionSharkrfByOTB

args.name: input_predict
args.description: A list of input predictor images.

args.name: input_label
args.description: A list of input label images

args.name: ratio
args.description: Ratio between training and validation samples.

args.name: nbtrees
args.description: The maximum number of trees in the forest. Typically, the more trees you have, the better the accuracy. However, the improvement in accuracy generally diminishes and reaches an asymptote for a certain number of trees.

args.name: nodesize
args.description: If the number of samples in a node is smaller than this parameter, then the node will not be split. A reasonable value is a small percentage of the total data e.g. 1 percent.

args.name: mtry
args.description: The number of features (variables) which will be tested at each node in order to compute the split. If set to zero, the square root of the number of features is used.

args.name: oobr
args.description: Set the fraction of the original training dataset to use as the out of bag sample.A good default value is 0.66.

definitionJson.name: Coverage.trainImagesRegressionSharkrfByOTB
definitionJson.author: OGE
definitionJson.description: Coverage.trainImagesRegressionSharkrfByOTB

sampleCode:
import oge
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

#读取 Landsat 8 影像（示例影像）
lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
lc08_select = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08, ["B1", "B2", "B3", "B4"])
lc08_label = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08, ["B5"])
predictor_collection = service.getProcess("CoverageCollection.fromCoverages").execute([lc08_select])
label_collection = service.getProcess("CoverageCollection.fromCoverages").execute([lc08_label])

#调用 Coverage.trainImagesRegressionSharkrfByOTB（不加参数名称）
result = service.getProcess("Coverage.trainImagesRegressionSharkrfByOTB").execute(
    predictor_collection,   
    label_collection,       
    0.5,                    
    100,                    
    25,                     
    0,                  
    0.66,                   
)
result.log("result")

name: CoverageArray.add
description: CoverageArray.add

definitionJson.description: Adds the first value to the second for each matched pair of bands in every image of the CoverageArray and image. If either image of the CoverageArray or image has only 1 band, then it is used against all the bands in the other image. If the images have the same number of bands, but not the same names, they're used pairwise in the natural order. The output bands are named for the longer of the two inputs, or if they're equal in length, in image1's order. The type of the output pixels is the union of the input types.

args.name: coverageArray
args.description: The image from which the left operand bands are taken.

args.name: coverage
args.description: The image from which the right operand bands are taken.

sampleCode:
import oge

# 1. 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

# 2. 获取特征影像和标签影像 Coverage
lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
lc08_select = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08, ["B1", "B2", "B3", "B4"])
lc08_label = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08, ["B5"])

# 3. 训练 Factorization Machines 分类模型
fm_model = service.getProcess("Coverage.fmClassifierModel").execute(
    lc08_select,   # featuresCoverage
    lc08_label,     # labelCoverage
    1.0,            # stepSize
    8,              # factorSize
    True,           # fitIntercept
    True,           # fitLinear
    0.01,           # initStd
    100,            # maxIter
    1.0,            # minBatchFraction
    0.0,            # regParam
    0,              # seed
    "adamW",        # solver
    0.000001        # tol
)

# 4. 导出模型
fm_model.export("fm_classifier_model")
author: OGE

sampleCode:
import oge

# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

# 获取特征影像和标签影像
lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
lc08_select = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08, ["B1", "B2", "B3", "B4"])
lc08_label = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08, ["B5"])

# 训练 FM 回归模型

# 导出模型到指定目录
fm_model.export("model")  # "model" 为保存路径，可以是相对或绝对路径

name: Kernel.robert
description: 通过计算图像中对角线方向相邻像素间的差异来近似图像的梯度幅值，从而检测边缘。
descriptionEn: Edges are detected by approximating the gradient magnitude of the image by calculating the difference between adjacent pixels in the diagonal direction of the image.

args.name: normalize
args.description: 将核值归一化为总和为1。

args.name: magnitude
args.description: 按照用户自定义数值，缩放卷积核每个值。

definitionJson.name: Kernel.robert
definitionJson.description: 通过计算图像中对角线方向相邻像素间的差异来近似图像的梯度幅值，从而检测边缘。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Edges are detected by approximating the gradient magnitude of the image by calculating the difference between adjacent pixels in the diagonal direction of the image.

sampleCode:
import oge
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

# 获取影像
ls8 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00",productID="LC08_L1T")

# 选择 B3
b3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B3"])
kernel = service.getProcess("Kernel.robert").execute(True, 1.0)

# 卷积
a = service.getProcess("Coverage.convolve").execute(b3, kernel)

# 可视化
vis_params = {
    "min": -1,
    "max": 1,
    "palette": ["#808080", "#949494", "#a9a9a9", "#bdbebd", "#d3d3d3", "#e9e9e9"]
}

a.styles(vis_params).getMap("Roberts")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.30, 30.608, 10)

name: Coverage.and
description: 如果对于coverage1和coverage2中的每对匹配的波段，两个值都不为零，则返回 1。如果两个coverage都只有一个波段，则是波段间的and操作。
descriptionEn: If both values are non-zero for each pair of matched bands in coverage1 and coverage2, then return 1. If both covers have only one band, it is an and operation between bands.

definitionJson.name: Coverage.and
definitionJson.description: 如果对于coverage1和coverage2中的每对匹配的波段，两个值都不为零，则返回 1。如果两个coverage都只有一个波段，则是波段间的and操作。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: If both values are non-zero for each pair of matched bands in coverage1 and coverage2, then return 1. If both covers have only one band, it is an and operation between bands.

sampleCode:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

ls8 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
b4 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B4"])
b3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B3"])
ndwi = service.getProcess("Coverage.and").execute(b4, b3)
# 设置渲染模式，其中"min":-1代表将-1映射到png图像的0，max": 1代表将1映射到png图像的255，"palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]设置了渲染模式
vis_params = {'min': -1, 'max': 1,
              "palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]}

# 输出结果
ndwi.styles(vis_params).getMap("ndwi")
# 设置前端地图中心位置和显示层级
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.28, 30.57, 9)

name: FeatureCollection.aggregateMin
description: 聚合函数（数值最小值）是从一组数值中找出并返回最小的那个值。它将整个数据集汇总为一个单一的标量结果，直观反映了该组数值的下限范围。
descriptionEn: The aggregation function (minimum value) is a basic data summary function that finds and returns the smallest value from a set of values. It summarizes the entire data set into a single scalar result that visually reflects the lower range of values for the set.

output.name: output
output.description: 指定属性字段的最小值

args.name: collection
args.description: 输入要素集合（DataFrame / FeatureCollection）

args.name: property
args.description: 参与统计的数值型属性字段名称

definitionJson.name: FeatureCollection.aggregateMin
definitionJson.description: 聚合函数（数值最小值）是从一组数值中找出并返回最小的那个值。它将整个数据集汇总为一个单一的标量结果，直观反映了该组数值的下限范围。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: The aggregation function (minimum value) is a basic data summary function that finds and returns the smallest value from a set of values. It summarizes the entire data set into a single scalar result that visually reflects the lower range of values for the set.

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
# 多边形坐标 + 属性列表
data = [
    ([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]], "10"),
    ([[[38, 10], [38, 15], [43, 15], [43, 10], [38, 10]]], "20"),
    ([[[36, 11], [36, 14], [39, 14], [39, 11], [36, 11]]], "30"),
    ([[[34, 12], [34, 14], [37, 14], [37, 12], [34, 12]]], "40")
]
# 批量创建 features
features = []
for coords, attr in data:
    geometry = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute(coords, "EPSG:4326")
    feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry, f"{{a:{attr}}}")
    features.append(feature)
# 构建 FeatureCollection
featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute(features)

result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.aggregateMin").execute(featureCollection,"a")
result.log("min")
featureCollection.styles(["#0000ff"]).getMap("featureCollection")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(37, 12, 5)

description: 对矢量要素集执行几何联合运算，将集合中所有要素的空间范围进行叠加融合，生成一个融合后的几何对象。
descriptionEn: Perform geometric union operations on vector feature sets, superimpose and fuse the spatial ranges of all features in the set, and generate a fused geometric object.

args.name: collection1
args.description: 用于联合操作的第一矢量要素集合。

args.name: collection2
args.description: 用于联合操作的第二矢量要素集合。

args.name: geometryFieldName
args.description: 常量字段名。

definitionJson.name: FeatureCollection.union
definitionJson.description: 对矢量要素集执行几何联合运算，将集合中所有要素的空间范围进行叠加融合，生成一个融合后的几何对象。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Perform geometric union operations on vector feature sets, superimpose and fuse the spatial ranges of all features in the set, and generate a fused geometric object.

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]], "EPSG:4326")
featureCollection1 = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry1, "{a:10}", 0)

geometry2 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[179, 89], [36, 14], [39, 14], [39, 11], [179, 89]]], "EPSG:4326")
featureCollection2 = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry2, "{a:15}", 0)

result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.union").execute(featureCollection1, featureCollection2, "geom")

featureCollection1.styles(["#000000"]).getMap("featureCollection1")
featureCollection2.styles(["#111111"]).getMap("featureCollection2")
result.styles(["#FF0000"]).getMap("union")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(37, 12, 5)

name: FeatureCollection.spatialJoinOneToOne

args.description: 左侧要素集合

args.description: 左集合几何列名

args.name: rightGeometryFieldName

definitionJson.name: FeatureCollection.spatialJoinOneToOne
definitionJson.description: 基于几何对象之间的空间关系，进行不同图层属性信息的组合操作。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Combining attribute information from different layers based on spatial relationships between geometric objects.

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
# 构建要素集
geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]],"EPSG:4326")
featureCollection1 = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry1, "{a:10}", "1")

geometry2 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[36, 11], [36, 14], [39, 14], [39, 11], [36, 11]]],"EPSG:4326")
featureCollection2 = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry2, "{a:15}", "1")

# 要素集空间连接
result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.spatialJoinOneToOne").execute(leftCollection=featureCollection1,rightCollection=featureCollection2,reduceProperties=["a"],reduceRules=["sum"],
leftGeometryFieldName="geom",rightGeometryFieldName="geom",useIndex=True,spatialPredicate="Intersects")

# 设置样式与地图展示
result.styles(["#FF0000"]).getMap("spatialJoin")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(36.5, 14.0, 5)

definitionJson.author: OGE
definitionJson.description: Coverage.gbtRegressionModel

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

# 获取特征和标签影像
lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
lc08_select = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08, ["B1", "B2", "B3", "B4"])
lc08_label = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(lc08, ["B5"])

# 运行 GBT 回归模型训练
model = service.getProcess("Coverage.gbtRegressionModel").execute(
    lc08_select,      # featuresCoverage
    lc08_label,        # labelCoverage
    10,                # checkpointInterval
    "auto",            # featureSubsetStrategy
    "variance",        # impurity
    "squared",         # lossType
    32,                # maxBins
    5,                 # maxDepth
    10,                # maxIter
    0.0,               # minInfoGain
    1,                 # minInstancesPerNode
    0.0,               # minWeightFractionPerNode
    0,                 # seed
    0.1,               # stepSize
    1.0                # subsamplingRate
)

# 导出模型
model.export("model")
author: OGE

name: Kernel.kirsch
description: 生成一个3×3的Kirsch边缘检测卷积核。非线性、多方向的边缘检测算子，通过计算8个不同方向的梯度响应并取最大值来检测边缘。
descriptionEn: Generate a 3×3 Kirsch edge detection convolution kernel. A nonlinear, multi-directional edge detection operator that detects edges by calculating gradient responses in 8 different directions and taking the maximum value.

args.name: normalize
args.description: 将核值归一化为总和为1。

args.name: magnitude
args.description: 按照用户自定义数值，缩放卷积核每个值。

definitionJson.name: Kernel.kirsch
definitionJson.description: 生成一个3×3的Kirsch边缘检测卷积核。非线性、多方向的边缘检测算子，通过计算8个不同方向的梯度响应并取最大值来检测边缘。
definitionJson.descriptionEn: Generate a 3×3 Kirsch edge detection convolution kernel. A nonlinear, multi-directional edge detection operator that detects edges by calculating gradient responses in 8 different directions and taking the maximum value.

sampleCode:
import oge

oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

ls8 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
b3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B3"])
kernel = service.getProcess("Kernel.kirsch").execute(False,1)
a = service.getProcess("Coverage.convolve").execute(b3,kernel)

vis_params = {"min": -1, "max": 1, "palette": ["#808080", "#949494", "#a9a9a9", "#bdbebd", "#d3d3d3","#e9e9e9"]}
a.styles(vis_params).getMap("a")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.30, 30.608, 10)

sampleCode:
import oge

# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()
# 读取数据
ls8 = service.getCoverage(
coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")
b3 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B3"])
b2 = service.getProcess("Coverage.selectBands").execute(ls8, ["B2"])

# 调用函数处理数据
ndwi = service.getProcess(
"Coverage.not").execute(b3, b2)

# 设置渲染模式，其中"min":-1代表将-1映射到png图像的0，"max": 1代表将1映射到png图像的255，
# "palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]设置了渲染模式

vis_params = {'min': -1, 'max': 1,
"palette": ["gold", "yellow", "brown", "lightblue", "blue"]}

# 输出结果
ndwi.styles(vis_params).getMap("ndwi")
# 设置前端地图中心位置和显示层级
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.28, 30.57, 9)

import oge

service = oge.Service.initialize()

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
# 加载矢量
geometry = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]],"EPSG:4326")

array.log("array")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(37,12,5)

import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

geometry = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute([[114.836,30.251],[114.854,30.324],[114.867,30.274],[114.875,30.316],[114.888,30.246],[114.896,30.298],[114.917,30.321],[114.930,30.298],[114.914,30.246],[114.945,30.238],[114.961,30.313],[114.979,30.233]],"EPSG:4326")

definitionJson.alias: 聚合函数（无重复数量统计）

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
# 多边形坐标 + 属性列表
data = [
    ([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]], "10"),
    ([[[38, 10], [38, 15], [43, 15], [43, 10], [38, 10]]], "20"),
    ([[[36, 11], [36, 14], [39, 14], [39, 11], [36, 11]]], "30"),
    ([[[34, 12], [34, 14], [37, 14], [37, 12], [34, 12]]], "40")
]
# 批量创建 features
features = []
for coords, attr in data:
    geometry = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute(coords, "EPSG:4326")
    feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry, f"{{a:{attr}}}")
    features.append(feature)
# 构建 FeatureCollection
featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute(features)

result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.aggregateCountDistinct").execute(featureCollection,"a")
result.log("count_distinct")
featureCollection.styles(["#0000ff"]).getMap("featureCollection")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(37, 12, 5)

name: FeatureCollection.aggregateMax
description: 聚合函数（数值最大值）是从一组数值中找出并返回最大的那个值。它将整个数据集汇总为一个单一的标量结果，直观反映了该组数值的上限范围。
descriptionEn: The aggregate function (maximum value) is to find and return the largest value from a set of values. It summarizes the entire data set into a single scalar result that visually reflects the upper range of values for that group.

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]],"EPSG:4326")
feature1 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry1, "{a:10}")

geometry2 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[38, 10], [38, 15], [43, 15], [43, 10], [38, 10]]],"EPSG:4326")
feature2 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry2, "{a:15}")

featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute([feature1,feature2])
result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.geometryGetAndMerge").execute(featureCollection,"geom")
result_feat = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(result, "{a:15}")

result_feat.styles(["#111111"]).getMap("geometryGetAndMerge")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(37,12,5)

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
# 多边形坐标 + 属性列表
data = [
    ([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]], "10"),
    ([[[38, 10], [38, 15], [43, 15], [43, 10], [38, 10]]], "20"),
    ([[[36, 11], [36, 14], [39, 14], [39, 11], [36, 11]]], "30"),
    ([[[34, 12], [34, 14], [37, 14], [37, 12], [34, 12]]], "40")
]
# 批量创建 features
features = []
for coords, attr in data:
    geometry = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute(coords, "EPSG:4326")
    feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry, f"{{a:{attr}}}")
    features.append(feature)
# 构建 FeatureCollection
featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute(features)
# 有限元素获取
result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.limit").execute(featureCollection,2,"a",True)
result.styles(["#0000ff"]).getMap("result")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(37, 12, 5)

sampleCode:
import oge

# 1. 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service()

# 2. 构建几何要素
coords1 = [[[35.0, 10.0], [35.0, 15.0], [40.0, 15.0], [40.0, 10.0], [35.0, 10.0]]]
geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute(
    coordinates=coords1, 
    crs="EPSG:4326"
)

coords2 = [[[36.0, 11.0], [36.0, 14.0], [39.0, 14.0], [39.0, 11.0], [36.0, 11.0]]]
geometry2 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute(
    coordinates=coords2, 
    crs="EPSG:4326"
)

# 3. 构建要素集
featureCollection1 = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry1, "{a:10}")
featureCollection2 = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry2, "{a:15}")

# 4. 要素集合并
result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.merge").execute(featureCollection1, featureCollection2)


# 5. 设置样式与地图展示
result.styles(["#FF0000"]).getMap("boundary")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(36.5, 14.0, 5)

import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

# 多边形坐标 + 属性列表
data = [
    ([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]], "10"),
    ([[[38, 10], [38, 15], [43, 15], [43, 10], [38, 10]]], "20")
]
# 批量创建 features
features = []
for coords, attr in data:
    geometry = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute(coords, "EPSG:4326")
    feature = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry, f"{{a:{attr}}}")
    features.append(feature)
# 构建 FeatureCollection

result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.randomColumn").execute(featureCollection,"a",0,"uniform",[])
result.styles(["#0000ff"]).getMap("randomColumn")

import oge
# 初始化

service = oge.Service.initialize()
geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]],"EPSG:4326")

geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute([[35.1, 15.7], [36.3, 15.9], [37.5, 15.6]],"EPSG:4326")
feature1 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry1, "{a:10}")

geometry2 = service.getProcess("Geometry.LineString").execute([[35.2, 12.1], [36.4, 12.0], [37.6, 12.3]],"EPSG:4326")
feature2 = service.getProcess("Feature.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry2, "{a:15}")

# 构建集合并进行类型感知过滤
featureCollection = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromFeatureList").execute([feature1, feature2])
result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.filterMetadata").execute(featureCollection,"a","greater_than","11")

# 设置样式与地图展示
result.styles(["#FF0000"]).getMap("result")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(36.5, 14.0, 5)

sampleCode:
import oge
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()

lc08 = service.getCoverage(coverageID="LC81220392015275LGN00", productID="LC08_L1T")

# -------- 运行 gteByGEE --------
result = service.getProcess("Coverage.gteByGEE").execute(
    lc08,        # coverage
    10000         # threshold（示例：阈值=0.5）
)

# 可视化
vis_params = {"palette": ["#808080", "#949494", "#a9a9a9", "#bdbebd", "#d3d3d3","#e9e9e9"]}
result.styles(vis_params).getMap("result")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(114.30, 30.608, 10)

name: FeatureCollection.loadFromGeometry
alias: 从几何对象矢量要素集

definitionJson.name: FeatureCollection.loadFromGeometry
definitionJson.alias: 从几何对象矢量要素集

sampleCode:
import oge
# 初始化
oge.initialize()
service = oge.Service.initialize()
# 构建要素集
geometry1 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[35, 10], [35, 15], [40, 15], [40, 10], [35, 10]]],"EPSG:4326")
featureCollection1 = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry1, "{a:10}",0)

geometry2 = service.getProcess("Geometry.Polygon").execute([[[36, 11], [36, 14], [39, 14], [39, 11], [36, 11]]],"EPSG:4326")
featureCollection2 = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.loadFromGeometry").execute(geometry2, "{a:15}",0)

# 要素集合并
result = service.getProcess("FeatureCollection.mergeAll").execute([featureCollection1,featureCollection2])

# 设置样式与地图展示
featureCollection1.styles(["#000000"]).getMap("featureCollection1")
featureCollection2.styles(["#111111"]).getMap("featureCollection2")
result.styles(["#FF0000"]).getMap("result")
oge.mapclient.centerMap(36.5, 14.0, 5)
